metadata.title: AJH Libas Collection — Fashion & Lifestyle
metadata.description: AJH Libas Collection — curated clothing for men, women & kids. Discover styles you'll love and shop with confidence.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.signInToSync: to save addresses and orders to your account.
checkout.pinLookupSuccess: City and state filled from your PIN.
checkout.walletRefundHint: Returns to Libas Wallet are credited within ~1 hour in production. Bank refunds may take 5–7 business days.
checkout.whatsappUpdatesNote: We’ll send order updates on WhatsApp when you opt in (demo).
checkout.guestCheckoutHint: You can checkout as a guest — no account required. We’ll email you the receipt.
checkout.pinAutoHint: Enter 6-digit PIN — city and state fill automatically (demo).

checkout.trustSecure: Trusted checkout — same security as major banks
checkout.trustOriginal: 100% original products — sourced from trusted suppliers
checkout.singlePageHint: Complete address, review items, and pay — all in one focused flow.
checkout.loginRequiredTitle: Sign in to place your order
checkout.loginRequiredBody: Orders are saved to your account so we can confirm delivery and show them in Admin. Please log in or use quick OTP.
checkout.contactRequiredHint: Enter your full name and mobile for this delivery. If you signed in with email, we use it for updates — no duplicate email field.
checkout.magicCheckoutAddressOnly: Fills only street / PIN / city from your saved address. Name, phone, and email are not auto-filled.
checkout.razorpayRequiredHint: Online payment is required: use the Razorpay button above. Your order is created only after payment succeeds (no demo bypass).
checkout.couponsHint: One tap to apply — rules are set in admin (new users, min order, etc.).
checkout.zoneDeliveryHint: Zone rate for {city}: ₹{zoneFee} (free above ₹500 on cart).
checkout.razorpayHint: Secure payment via Razorpay — supports UPI, cards, net banking and more. Requires NEXT_PUBLIC_RAZORPAY_KEY_ID and server RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET.

checkout.razorpayOrderError: Could not create Razorpay order. Check API keys.
checkout.upiAnyHint: Pay with any UPI app on your phone
checkout.saveCardFuture: Save card securely for next time (demo tokenization)
checkout.prepaidDiscountHint: Prepaid orders get a small instant discount. COD is available below.
checkout.codLastHint: Place at the end — prepaid orders may save more.
checkout.paymentFailureRefund: If a payment fails but money is debited, it is safe — refunds typically arrive in 3–5 business days (demo copy).
checkout.paymentFailedRefund: Don't worry — if any amount was debited, it will be refunded in 3–5 business days. You can try again.
checkout.omnichannelSubtitle: Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, cards, net banking & wallets — routed securely via Razorpay when configured.
checkout.otpAutofillHint: SMS OTP: On Android Chrome, your bank OTP may auto-fill (WebOTP) when the SMS format is supported. Razorpay’s checkout also works inside your bank app.
checkout.savedCardsTokenHint: Save card for faster checkout — we only store a secure token on this device (demo). Real PCI tokenization is handled by Razorpay.
checkout.demoSimulatePaymentFailure: Demo: simulate a failed payment (then retry with another method)
checkout.magicCheckoutTitle: Quick checkout — fill from your profile & saved address
checkout.editAddressSubtitle: Update delivery details — PIN auto-fills city & state.
checkout.otpHint: We'll send a one-time code to your mobile when SMS is configured.
checkout.otpNotConfigured: SMS OTP is not configured on this store yet.
checkout.abandonBody: You left checkout recently — your cart still has items. Continue where you left off (demo reminder after ~10 min).
checkout.abandonWaText: Hi Libas — I'd like help with my cart (demo).

legal.privacyIntro: AJH Libas Collection (“we”, “us”) respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect personal information when you visit our website, create an account, or place an order. By using our services, you agree to this policy together with our Terms of service.
legal.privacyDemo: If you sign in with a third-party provider (for example Firebase or another identity service), your account data is also subject to that provider’s terms and privacy notice, in addition to this policy.
legal.privacyBusinessBody: This online store is operated by AJH Libas Collection. Registered business address: National Bazar, Raninagar, Murshidabad, West Bengal 742308, India. This address may be used for legal notices, returns, and customer correspondence where applicable.
legal.privacyDataBody: Name, phone number, and email; shipping and billing addresses; order and cart history; payment references and transaction IDs from our payment partner (we do not store full card numbers, CVV, or card PIN on our servers); device and browser information; IP address and approximate location; cookies and similar technologies as described in our Cookie policy; and messages you send to support or the Help center.
legal.privacyUseBody: To process and deliver orders; communicate about your purchase; prevent fraud and abuse; improve our website and services; comply with legal obligations; send transactional messages (order updates, delivery); and respond to your requests.
legal.privacyPaymentsBody: Online payments on this website are processed by Razorpay Software Private Limited (“Razorpay”), an authorised payment gateway in India. When you pay using card, UPI, net banking, or supported wallets, your payment information is collected and processed on Razorpay’s secure systems, which are designed to meet PCI-DSS and applicable standards. EMI (installments) is not offered on this store. We do not store your full card number, CVV, or PIN on our servers. We may receive from Razorpay transaction references, payment status, masked or tokenised card identifiers, and related metadata needed to confirm your order, process refunds, reconcile accounts, prevent fraud, and provide customer support. Razorpay’s own terms of use and privacy policy apply to the payment step. For cash on delivery (COD), where offered, collection may be handled separately and is not processed through Razorpay’s card/UPI flow.
legal.privacySecurityBody: We use HTTPS (TLS) for data in transit, access controls for systems that hold personal data, and reputable service providers for hosting and payments. While we follow reasonable security practices, no website or Internet transmission is completely secure; please protect your account credentials and report suspected unauthorised access promptly.
legal.privacyRetentionBody: We retain personal data for as long as needed to fulfil the purposes above, including order fulfilment, accounting, tax, and legal compliance, and for a reasonable period afterward to resolve disputes and enforce our terms. When data is no longer required, we delete or anonymise it in line with our internal practices and applicable law.
legal.privacyRightsBody: You may access or update certain information in your account settings. You may request correction of inaccurate data or ask how we use your information by contacting us through the Help center or the contact details on this site. Where applicable law provides additional rights (such as objection or erasure), we will honour those requests subject to legal exceptions.
legal.privacyGrievanceBody: For privacy concerns, data requests, or disputes related to your order, contact AJH Libas Collection via the Help center or email. For questions specifically about a card or bank charge shown as Razorpay, you may also contact Razorpay support through channels listed on Razorpay’s website. We aim to respond within a reasonable time.
legal.termsIntro: By shopping on AJH Libas Collection you agree to these terms. You should read them together with our Privacy policy and Shipping & returns information.
legal.termsDemo: Products, prices, offers, and availability may change. We may refuse or cancel orders in case of pricing errors, suspected fraud, or stock issues.
legal.termsOrdersBody: When you place an order, you offer to buy at the price shown subject to acceptance and dispatch. Risk passes on delivery to the carrier or as per our shipping policy.
legal.termsLiabilityBody: To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect losses. Our liability for any claim relating to an order is limited to the amount you paid for that order.
legal.shippingIntro: Delivery times and return windows depend on your pincode and product category. The details below are typical — your order confirmation may state exceptions.
legal.shippingDispatchBody: We aim to pack and hand over orders to our courier partners within the stated timeline. Delays may occur during sales or force majeure.
legal.shippingReturnsBody: Eligible items can be returned within the return window shown on the product or order page, in original condition with tags. Refunds are processed to the original payment method or wallet where applicable.
legal.shippingCodBody: COD may be available only in selected areas. Courier may verify OTP or identity at delivery.
legal.cookiesIntro: We use cookies and similar technologies to run the site, remember preferences, and understand traffic.
legal.cookiesEssentialBody: Required for login, cart, checkout, security, and language or theme choices.
legal.cookiesAnalyticsBody: With your consent where required, we may use analytics or advertising cookies. You can control cookies in your browser settings.
legal.legalMoreHelpBody: Visit our Help center or contact support — we’re happy to clarify policies.

footer.razorpaySectionSubtitle: Pay with UPI, Visa, Mastercard, RuPay, PhonePe, Paytm, and net banking (via Razorpay). EMI is not offered on this store.
footer.razorpayProcessorDisclaimer: Card and bank payments are processed securely by Razorpay Software Private Limited. AJH Libas Collection does not store your full card number or CVV on its own servers; payment data is handled by Razorpay in line with applicable security standards. EMI is not offered on this website.
footer.codCheckoutNote: Cash on delivery may be offered separately for eligible orders (not processed through Razorpay).
footer.footerRegisteredAddress:
National Bazar, Raninagar,
Murshidabad, West Bengal 742308,
India
footer.footerCopyright: © {year} AJH Libas Collection. All rights reserved.

help.title: Help center
help.intro: Find quick answers about orders, returns, wallet refunds, and your account. For anything else, contact us below.

cancel.q: How do I cancel my order?
cancel.a: If your order has not shipped yet, use Cancel order on My orders. After dispatch, you can refuse at the door or request a return after delivery (within the return window).

return.a: Most items can be returned or exchanged within 7–10 days of delivery, in original condition with tags. Some categories may have different rules — check the product page.

wallet.a: Choosing Libas Wallet for refunds is usually instant (within about an hour in production). Bank transfers can take several business days.

delivery.a: Enter your PIN on the product page for a demo delivery estimate. Final dates depend on courier capacity and your location.

account.q: Where do I update my address or phone?
account.a: Go to Account → Settings. You can manage addresses, OTP verification for phone, and notification preferences there.

help.contactDemo: Numbers and emails are placeholders — replace with your real support channels before launch.

chat.title: Libas support
chat.botGreeting: Hi! I’m your quick-help assistant. Pick a topic below or visit the help center.

q1.a: Open Account → My orders to see live status. You’ll also get updates by email and optionally WhatsApp.

q2.a: Refunds to Libas Wallet are fastest. Bank refunds follow your bank’s timeline (demo store).

q3.q: How do I change my delivery address?
q3.a: If the order isn’t shipped, cancel and reorder, or contact support. After shipping, courier apps may allow limited edits.

admin.catalogLiveBannerUnconfiguredTitle: Live catalog is off for shoppers
admin.catalogLiveBannerUnconfiguredBody: The server has no Firestore Admin key (set FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON on your host, e.g. Vercel). Products you save here stay in this browser only until cloud sync works. Firebase Storage is only for image files — it does not publish the product list.

admin.catalogLiveBannerSyncBody: You have {localCount} product(s) locally; Firestore has none. After Save, check for “Cloud sync failed” or missing admin access. Other devices and logged-in customers will not see products until sync succeeds.
admin.catalogLiveBannerEmptyTitle: No products on the live catalog yet
admin.catalogLiveBannerEmptyBody: Add a product in the wizard and save. Large data-URL images are stripped before upload; use https image URLs or enable Storage if uploads fail.
admin.imageDropHint: Drag & drop or pick a file — square crop exports at {size}×{size}px (high quality, ~92% JPEG).

admin.supportSubtitle: Moderate reviews and reply to tickets.
admin.supportHeroHint: Desk works with local demo data. Live queue will automatically fall back to local data when Firestore access is unavailable.
admin.supportRemoteErrorFoot: If this keeps happening, check account access and Firebase server configuration.
admin.supportRemoteNetwork: Network error while contacting the server.
admin.supportLiveEmptyReviews: No pending product reviews in Firestore.
admin.supportLiveEmptyThreads: No order help threads in Firestore yet.
admin.supportLiveFallbackHint: Using local support data because Firestore access is unavailable.
admin.supportFirestoreReviewsHint: Submitted from the storefront. Publish to show on the product page, or block.
admin.supportFirestoreThreadsHint: Messages from “Need help?” on orders — reply here.
admin.reviewModHint: Feature photo reviews on the homepage, reply publicly, auto-pending on profanity, and reward UGC.
admin.reviewAdminReply: Public reply (shown on storefront when wired)
admin.reviewReplyPlaceholder: e.g. Thank you for the kind words!
admin.lowRatingReportHint: Review catalogue quality or delist — demo uses mock ratings.
admin.lowRatingEmpty: No products below 3★ in the demo catalogue — showing lowest-rated items instead.
admin.ticketsAdvancedHint: Statuses, priority, SLA (24h first response), order context, internal notes, canned replies.
admin.chatSupportHint: WhatsApp handoff is logged; bot answers FAQs then escalates.
admin.whatsappLogHint: Recent redirects from the storefront widget:
admin.botHandoverBody: Simple intents are auto-answered; complex threads appear in Active chats with a handover flag.
admin.seoSubtitle: Meta tags per category and wishlist / view funnels.
admin.seoSnippetHint: Edit title & description — preview updates live. Aim for green SEO score.
admin.seoHint_title_short: Title is a bit short for Google.
admin.seoHint_title_long: Title may be truncated in search results.
admin.seoHint_desc_short: Description is short — add more context.
admin.seoHint_desc_long: Description may be cut off in SERP.
admin.sitemapHint: Download a sitemap of public routes (demo). Submit to Google Search Console.
admin.sitemapApiHint: Also available at /api/sitemap for crawlers (same content).
admin.bulkApply: Apply to all products in category
admin.bulkApplied: Updated meta title for {n} products (demo, localStorage).
admin.redirectHint: When a product URL is removed, map old path → similar product. Applied client-side in demo.
admin.pixelFacebookHint: Meta Pixel ID — remarketing and conversion events.
admin.gtmContainerHint: Google Tag Manager — centralize tags in production.
admin.monthlyReportHint: Production: schedule PDF to admin email. Demo shows a placeholder alert.
admin.monthlyReportDemo: Would queue PDF to admin@yourstore.com — connect billing & mail provider.
admin.abandonedCartHint: Reach out with WhatsApp or email using a saved coupon.
admin.abandonedCartWhatsappMsg: Hi! Use coupon {coupon} on your cart — Libas
admin.mvlpHint: Investigate price, photos, or copy when views ≫ purchases.
admin.behaviorHint: Products with high views + wishlist but low conversion.
admin.behaviorDemoNote: Sample report — catalogue has {n} demo products.
admin.hourlyTrendHint: Revenue by hour (IST) — spot lunch dips and evening peaks.
admin.funnelHint: Visitor → view → cart → paid. If cart is high but paid is low, check checkout.
admin.regionMapHint: Relative volume today — plan COD float and regional campaigns.
admin.paymentSplitHint: Share of today’s revenue by method — plan cash handling for COD.
admin.aovHint: Revenue ÷ orders today — lift with bundles or thresholds.
admin.liveFeedDemoNote: Simulated feed — connect websockets or analytics in production.
admin.feedCheckout: Someone from {city} just completed a purchase.
admin.trackingSavedDemo: Tracking saved — visible on the customer order page (demo).
admin.trackingSavedLocalOnly: Saved for this browser only (demo). Add the customer Firebase UID below and save again to update Firestore for the live account page.
admin.trackingSavedFirestore: Tracking saved — customer order page will update from Firestore.
admin.trackingSaveFailed: Could not update Firestore. Check server env (FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON) and admin session.
admin.firebaseUidHint: Must match the signed-in customer. Same order ID as in users/{uid}/orders/{orderId}.
admin.courierFetchDemo: Demo: add Delhivery / Ecom Express API keys to fetch live status.
admin.notifyWhatsAppDemo: Demo: would send WhatsApp/SMS — connect Twilio or Meta Cloud API.
admin.privateNotePlaceholder: e.g. Include a gift voucher for this customer
admin.timelineNotePlaceholder: e.g. Reached Kolkata hub — shown on customer tracker
admin.refundWalletNote: Refund queued to wallet (instant in production).
admin.refundBankNote: Refund queued to bank (3–5 business days in production).
admin.usersSubtitleExtended: Customer insights, segments, activity, referrals, and security controls (demo data).
admin.userSearchPlaceholder: Name, email, phone, Firebase UID, or order ID…
admin.userRecentViewsEmpty: No recently viewed products synced yet.
admin.walletAdjustDemo: Adjusted wallet by ₹{amount} (demo — saved in this browser).
admin.loginAsUserDemo: Opens account area in a new tab with a demo flag — wire secure impersonation in production.
admin.banReasonPlaceholder: e.g. repeated fake orders, OTP abuse…
admin.usersBlockSaved: Block saved locally for this browser (demo).
admin.banReasonRequired: Please enter a reason before blocking.
admin.shadowBanHint: User can browse but checkout / reviews are hidden from others (demo toggle).
admin.fraudRulesPolicyHint: Planned automation (server-side in production) — not evaluated live in this demo.
admin.fraudRuleCancels: High cancel rate after dispatch triggers review.
admin.fraudRuleOtp: Repeated wrong OTP attempts flag the account.
admin.fraudRuleShadow: Shadow ban limits checkout and hides reviews without a public ban notice.
admin.fraudMsgFailed24: {count} failed payment attempts in the last 24 hours — review checkout and Razorpay.
admin.fraudMsgFailed7: {count} failed payments in the last 7 days.
admin.fraudMsgFailureRate: High failure rate: {ratePct}% ({failed}/{attempts} attempts in 7 days).
admin.fraudMsgWalletAdmin: Large wallet admin adjustments in 24h (≈₹{rupees}) — confirm each credit/debit.
admin.usersHeroHint: User list loads from Firebase Auth + Firestore. Block, wallet, and shadow toggles are saved in this browser for the demo. Live fraud signals use the same payment/wallet data as the dashboard.
admin.usersError: Could not load users. Check login and Firebase configuration.
admin.usersOrdersFetchHint: Order history for profiles could not be loaded (check Orders access and Firebase).
admin.usersForbidden: Access denied — your role may not include Users.
admin.usersEmpty: No users match the current filters.
admin.usersFraudLiveHint: Updates when checkout payment history or wallet admin ledger changes — same engine as the dashboard banner.
admin.usersFraudAllClear: No active signals from local payment/wallet data.
admin.ipBlockHint: Block new signups and checkout from these IPs (demo — saved in this browser).
admin.noOrdersUser: No orders for this user yet.
admin.dashboardFraudAlertBody: {n} active signal(s) — review flagged users under Users → Customers.
admin.shippingRulesHint: Free-shipping threshold, PIN-based fees, and COD handling — saved in this browser (demo).
admin.feeBelowThreshold: Delivery fee when cart is below threshold (₹)
admin.defaultPinFee: Fallback delivery fee if no PIN rule matches (₹)
admin.deliveryOtpHint: Rider enters OTP when cash is collected — shown here in real time (demo).
admin.codCashSubtitle: Delivered COD totals, courier remittance, and rider settlements (demo).
